\noindent Throughout this workshop, we work with the \ttblue{USSteamCo} data file, this is available in the \ttblue{aicpa} package. The data file is used in the AICPA Guide to Audit Analytics, Exhibit B-3.

\noindent The \ttblue{head} function shows the values of the variables (columns) in the first few observations (rows) from the dataset.
